name: popcorn-2026
label: Popcorn 2026 — Neon Noir
description: Hollywood-thriller neon palette for Ben Elton's Popcorn. Ink-violet ground; magenta dominant in preshow, cyan-dominant in interval, dimmed and reflective in postshow. Poster-tied yellow + red used sparingly as warning/alert accents to maintain visual continuity with the printed Popcorn poster.

watermark.notes: Neon-outline popcorn bucket with kernels above the rim. Single-colour stroke (gradient magenta→violet). Replaceable with a PNG of the actual poster bucket if preferred.

notes_for_engine: Map the named colours to CSS custom properties on :root (--ink, --neon-magenta, etc.).
Apply phase_overrides.dominant_neon as a body[data-phase] selector override on .headline text-shadow.
The watermark.image path is relative to branding/. If missing, fall back to the inline SVG used in popcorn-foyer-preview.html.
Google Fonts URL above is what the preview uses; for runtime, self-host the .woff2 files to avoid LAN-egress dependency.
